name: Fiesta Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
(From Potato City, Coudersport, PA.)
1. Dice the green bell pepper and onion.
2. Sauté the diced vegetables in butter for a few minutes until softened.
3. Cook the bacon and crumble it into bits.
4. Grate the Cheddar cheese, setting aside some for topping.
5. Prepare the mashed potatoes as desired.
6. While the potatoes are still hot, fold in the sautéed pepper and onion mixture.
7. Add the crumbled bacon and most of the grated cheese to the potatoes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Place the potato mixture in a casserole dish.
10. When ready to serve, top the dish with the remaining cheese.
11. Broil until the cheese melts. Serve hot.
